# ADR-014 — Secret detection patterns · summary

_Generated heuristically (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). For higher quality summaries, set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY._

- **Which patterns to detect** (vendor tokens, generic high-entropy strings, both?)
- **What action on detection** (warn vs block)
- **How to handle false positives** (test fixtures, examples, intentional)
- **`block`** (exit 2) — high-confidence vendor tokens. The hook blocks the tool call. The agent sees 
- **`warn`** (exit 0 + stderr) — patterns with non-zero false-positive rates. We surface to the agent 

- **Full doc:** docs/architecture/ADR-014-secret-detection-patterns.md
